text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back home with Mejiro Dober, we
spot a poster of Mejiro McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text: Hey look, it's a poster of McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yeah. She ran a great race the other day, but
that's just par for the course for a Mejiro!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...I'm fine. I was just thinking how right they are.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I was just thinking, "Yep, that's McQueen
for you."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Even the way she carries herself in day-to-day life
is just different... All while shouldering way more
responsibility than I do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Even the way she carries herself in day-to-day life
is just different... All while shouldering way more
responsibility than I do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
She has this aura of dignity and the skills to back
it up... No one can represent our family like her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just then, we pass by a bookstore and spot
someone very familiar.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
M-McQueen?! Didn't expect to run into you
here...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
D-Dober?! I was, erm... just passing by, you see,
and certainly not here to purchase the special
feature on Yutaka or anything...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Yutaka? Wait... that Yutaka?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Wait, Dober... you know Yutaka?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The mention of Yutaka excites them both, and we
end up ducking into a diner so they can chat.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Uh, yes? Oh, McQueen, did you see the thing
from the other day?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Uh, yes! Oh, McQueen, did you see the thing
from the other day?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes, I saw it in real time!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes, I saw it in real time!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you keep up with things in real time? I like to
wait and binge everything at once.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, well, that lets you savor things at your own
pace, I suppose...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But is it not thrilling to experience things as they
are happening?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hm... I guess, but the location is, well, you know...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Location? Oh, if you mean watching in person, I
suppose it is rather far...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Far? What do you mean? You can buy magazines
anywhere.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Magazines? I'm talking about the baseball
stadium...
choice_data_list:
I don't think you two are talking about the same
thing...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What? We're talking about Yutaka, the manga artist, aren't we? The one behind Burn Bright! Shibasaki Girls' Soccer Club.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! I thought we were talking about Yutaka the
baseball player!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Sorry... I just got so excited when I thought we
liked the same thing...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Same here... I thought we'd found a common
interest... So there's a manga artist named Yutaka
too, is there?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I imagine their work must be fascinating, given
how passionately you talk about it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. We'll have to chat again sometime soon,
and then you can tell me all about them!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I had no idea McQueen had a fangirl side to her...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Guess so.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Multifaceted... Yeah, I guess so.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to see more... See what other sides there
are to McQueen.
choice_data_list: Why don't you lend her some of your manga?
We could go to a baseball game together!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Now I'm curious to see what other sides there are
to McQueen, sides I don't know about...
choice_data_list: Why don't you lend her some of your manga?
We could go to a baseball game together!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: No, I don't want to be pushy or anything...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...But don't you think I'll come across as too
pushy?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Sure, but still... Well, I guess it couldn't hurt to
ask...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...That's true. I'll try asking if she'd like to borrow
some, then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I see the two of them happily
conversing in the cafeteria.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I see the two of them happily
conversing in the cafeteria.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that can't be! We have to wait until the next
volume to find out what happens to the club?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh... Ahem. Apologies for getting carried away.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
No, no, it's just... You had the exact same
reaction I did, so I was surprised... and happy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to Yutaka the manga artist, the two of
them become a little closer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That's... a good idea. I've been wanting to go to
one, so I think I'll ask her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, the three of us are on our way
back from a baseball game...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, the three of us are on our way
back from a baseball game...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I still cannot believe how much I screamed
during the game... How mortifying...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Don't be embarrassed! That home run was
scream-worthy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I know, right?! That decisive swing was proof that
he hadn't given up despite how far behind they
were!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
The tension right before he swung was palpable...
I can see why you like baseball so much. I'd love
to learn more.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Truly? Then we must attend another game sometime!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'd like that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two chat enthusiastically about the game the
entire way home.
